summary: Unit tests thoroughly cover main requirements (main/master/PR/semver tag generation, sanitization, error handling) with 14 well-named cases. Integration tests validate workflow structure and actionlint compliance. Missing coverage: edge cases (e.g., sanitization producing empty string, tag combinations like PR+semver), undefined behaviors (what tags should PR+version tag produce?), and comprehensive act testing (limited to 3 runs). Design is functional but split across two files; integration harness is complex without clear separation of concerns. Would catch basic regressions but miss subtle edge cases and unusual input combinations.
